page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 7T83 processors running at a base frequency of 2.55 GHz. The x86_64 architecture configuration provides 128 vCPUs with a one-to-one mapping of threads to physical cores, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

This instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, and there are no integrated GPUs on this instance type.

The high memory density and dedicated core allocation make this instance type qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that require predictable CPU performance. The absence of hyperthreading eliminates resource sharing at the core level, which is beneficial for workloads sensitive to CPU latency. Appropriate workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy data caching layers, and memory-bound analytics applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 7T83 processors running at 2.55 GHz. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture, this instance provides 128 vCPUs with a single thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading overhead for predictable compute performance. It is configured with 1024.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio. The instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications, making it suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise caching layers, and data analytics workloads that require high memory capacity and dedicated CPU resources.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high memory density for demanding in-memory enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 physical cores running at 2.55 GHz
1024 GB of system memory providing an 8.0 GB per core ratio
No hyperthreading with a 1.0 thread per core configuration
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfer
No local storage, requiring network-attached block storage
Optimized for in-memory databases and large-scale enterprise applications
